title: 10 best herbal tinctures for altitude sickness
description: Maypop tinctures helps with altitude sickness because it contains flavonoids and alkaloids that have vasodilatory properties, which can help to expand blood vessels and improve oxygen delivery to the body. The tannins in maypop also have anti-inflammatory effects, which can reduce swelling and discomfort associated with altitude sickness.
